title: Origins: delulugirl's Pollen Party Jam Submissions
description: The 2 origins I made for the Origins Discord server's "Pollen Party Jam", a jam where you could make an origin and a joke origin, under the theme of plants or its pollinators.
body:
## 🐝 delulugirl's Pollen Party Jam Submissions 🌷 - The 2 origins I made for the [Origins Discord Server's](https://discord.gg/YpMyhsBpAt) "Pollen Party Jam", something similar to a game jam in which you can create 1 Origin, and 1 Joke Origin under the theme of "plants and their pollinators". - This brings **2** new Origins to the game: - Fierofleurist (Serious) - A Real Bee (Joke) - Both of these Origins are also very playable, _yes, even the joke one._ ## 🐝 Origins 🌷 ### 🌼 Fierofleurist 🌼 > **Impact Level** 🟡🟡⚪ > _Born a regular human, they have dedicated their life to honing the science of botany for good, or bad..._ > **Years of Experimentation ❤️** > - You may be a regular human, but years of experimentation have given you good and bad side effects. 🧪 > - You have 2 lesser hearts, due to a few accidents in your hayday. 💔 > - Since you have the tiniest bit of plant DNA inside your body now, you feel saturated when exposed to the sun, but only if you're above 3 hunger bars. However, you now exhaust yourself much faster. 🍖 > - Your body can no longer support armor heavier than Iron. 🔩 > - When you get hit, you have a 20% chance to inflict damage onto your attacker, and heal some of the health you lost back. ‼️ > **Down To A Seed ❤️** > - As a result of your excess of knowledge on plants and flowers alike, you know how to create some of them, down to an atom. 🧠 > **I Think I'm Gonna Be Sick... ❤️** > - You have found a way to eat flowers / plants and gain some of their abilities through eating them. 🪷 > - However, you also found out that some of them give side effects. 🥀 > - You must sneak to eat flowers / plants, if you want to remove the effect of a flower / plant, spit it out by sneaking and using your Primary Power button. 😵‍💫 > - Only 1 plant ability can be equipped at a time. ☝️
🪷 Each Flower & The Abilities They Grant 🌷
![Dandelion, applies Saturation & Health Boost, Poppy, applies Haste & Speed 2, Kelp, gives unlimited air, Chorus Fruit, primary, teleport, teleports you 8 blocks in any direction you're looking at, has a 30% chance to fall and teleport you to a random place within your area, wither rose, primary, wither everyone, everyone within an 8 block radius of you gets the wither effect, you take 2 and a half hearts of damage almost every 2 seconds, Oxeye Daisy, primary, regenerate self, applies regeneration for almost 3 seconds, secondary, regenerate others, regenerates people you've "tagged" within an 8 block radius, to tag people right click on them, to untag people sneak then right click on them, to clear all tags you've made, sneak then use secondary, Torchflower, primary, burn others, burn anything and everything within an 8 block radius, secondary, Hot Hand, after activation your next hit will burn your target, Water hurts you, Sculk Vein, primary, smash, after activation your next hit will knock your target back further, secondary, roar, you roar, sending every entity within an 8 block radius back and dealing an extra 2 and a half hearts of damage, applies blindness & slowness 2, you grow to 1.5 times your size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9d08547102bebf4c0f8c1b0d337bc896d35833a.png)
🪷 Crafting Recipes for Each Flower 🌷
![Crafting Recipes for certain flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79b6246c7d869d7dff0d4d9a977656680562f11b.png)
--- ### 🐝 A Real Bee 🐝 > **Impact Level** 🔴 🔴 🔴 > The realest bee of them all... Don't believe what anyone tells you. > **They're Real ❤️** > - Gives you very real bee wings. 🪽 > - You can only glide for 5 seconds, after that you fall down. ⁉️ > - When not gliding, your flight bar increases by 1, allowing you to fly more. 🙏 > **Bees Hate You ❤️** > - Bees are sick and tired of you. Don't approach the bees. 🐝 > - It's so bad, they can sting forever for as long as they're angry at you. 😡 > **My Stash ❤️** > - Start with half a stack of honeycomb, and a bottle of honey. 🍯 > **I Swear I'm A Bee! ❤️** > - You can ONLY eat honey and honeycomb. ‼️ > - You HAVE to eat honey or honeycomb, to decrease your new vomit bar. 🤢 > - If you let the vomit bar fill up, you will vomit and get smaller and weaker, and your bar resets to 50%. 😩 > - However, when you're already half your regular size, you start taking damage and exhaustion instead. 😨 > - The vomit bar starts off at 50%. 💡 > **This Is A Sting! 🗡️** > - This is an extremely real sting. 👌 > - You have a 30% chance to daze your opponents by hitting them, applying blindness, and slowness. 😵‍💫 > - Though since you are committed to being a Bee, you die if you hit anything afterwards. 😵
🐝 Flight Time Bar & Vomit Bar 🤢
![A preview of the 2 bars in the "A Real Bee" origin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4e4c7fd467df474908f160be73733e3dad8e854.png)
🪽 Player Wings 🪽
![The "real wings" the player starts out with](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a51bf248a2d5bc09876c089659e272f923acfa2c.png)
